title: Screw Covers 100pcs Brown Plastic Screw Cap Hinged Fold Over Caps Rubber Dust Washer Flip Tops for M4-M8 Screw
features: 【Quality Material】: These screw head covers are made of reusable plastic,durable,anti-aging,waterproof and eco. Great for hiding those rusty screws on the downpipes
【Perfect choice】: These brown screw caps can match your cabinets ,wardrobes,chair,table ,wall etc, thus making your furniture more beautiful
【Easy installation】: just insert the screw into the bottom of the screw cap, tighten the screw, and cover the screw cap to complete
【Wide Application】：Brown screw covers are suitable for screws between M4-M6 and protect the screws from dust, water and rain. Suitable for indoor and outdoor decorative furniture, doors, walls.
description: Feature： 1, Eco-friendly plastic snap screw cover, durable,anti-aging,waterproof and smooth on surfaces. 2, The screw cover caps emerges well with your furniture and wall.Beautify and protect the screws. Specification: Material:Eco-friendly plastic Diameter:13mm/0.51inch Diameter of hole:5mm/0.19inch Thickness:5mm/ 0.20inch Colour:Brown Suitable for M4-M6 flat head specifications tapping screws. Package Included: 100pcs brown screw cover
